name: goal_suggestion
description: Suggest practical, valuable goals for the AI system
template:
Analyze the current system state and suggest practical, valuable goals:

System State:
{system_state}

Recent Performance:
{performance}

Suggest 3-5 goals that would improve the system.

Response format (one per line):
- [goal description]
system_prompt: You are a strategic planner. Suggest practical, valuable goals.
